summary: Wired IRR case in soundness_dense via new soundness_dense_valid theorem that proves valid_dense directly. Domain case uses irr_sound_dense_at_domain; non-domain case is documented sorry (semantic limitation, not part of task scope).

artifacts.summary: Implementation summary for IRR wiring restructure

metadata.sorry_note: The new sorry (line 681) is for non-domain times, explicitly excluded from task scope as per plan Non-Goals. Pre-existing sorries (lines 566-599) are in the generic soundness theorem and were not part of this task.

completion_data.completion_summary: Restructured soundness proof by creating soundness_dense_valid theorem that proves valid_dense directly. This enabled wiring the IRR case in soundness_dense using irr_sound_dense_at_domain. The non-domain case remains a documented sorry as anticipated in research (canonical models use full domains where this is vacuous).
